name: Regime Filter
description: Determines market regime using RDP swing structure (Dow Theory): Higher Highs + Higher Lows = uptrend, Lower Highs + Lower Lows = downtrend. Optionally checks a reference/benchmark symbol (e.g. SPY for stocks, BTC-USD for crypto) instead of the chart symbol itself.
author: system

tunable_params.label: Reference Symbol
tunable_params.description: Benchmark to check regime against. Leave empty to use the chart symbol's own structure. Use SPY/IWM for stocks, BTC-USD/ETH-USD for crypto.

tunable_params.label: Required Regime
tunable_params.description: expansion = longs only, distribution = shorts only, any = either direction

tunable_params.label: RDP Epsilon
tunable_params.description: RDP sensitivity for swing detection. Higher = fewer, larger swings.

tunable_params.label: Majority Threshold
tunable_params.description: Fraction of swing transitions that must agree to classify as uptrend or downtrend. 0.6 = 60% of highs falling + 60% of lows falling → downtrend.
